data.content: Implemented clickable version pill update check on branch feat/foolery-6aaf-version-pill at commit e14229f2243c. VersionBadge now opens a popover on click, requests /api/version?force=1, and shows loading, update-available, latest-installed, or error states. Added coverage in src/components/__tests__/version-badge.test.ts and visual review in src/stories/version-badge.stories.tsx. Validation completed in /Users/cartine/foolery-6aaf-impl: bun run lint (warnings only, exit 0), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build all passed.
